awesomeList.descriptionHTML: A curated list of useful Elm tutorials, libraries and software. Inspired by awesome list. Feel free to contribute. 🚀
awesomeList.description: A curated list of useful Elm tutorials, libraries and software. Inspired by awesome list. Feel free to contribute. :rocket:

nodes.itemHTML: • Elm in Action — In-depth book for Elm beginners, from Manning Publications.
• Egghead.io: Elm videos - Egghead's Elm video training, many of which are free.
• The Changelog 218 - Elm with Evan Czaplicki and Richard Feldman
• The Changelog 191 - Elm and Functional Programming with Richard Feldman.
• Html to Elm - Convert HTML to Elm.
• Elm TS Interopstars17 - Build up Encoders/Decoders between Elm and TypeScript.
• Elm TypeScript Interopstars167 - Generate TypeScript definitions from Elm (Elm TS Interop is an improved version of this).
• Elm Editor - Advanced Elm Live Editor
• Bucklescript-TEAstars584 - The Elm Architecture based on OCaml / Reason and Bucklescript
• Oolong - An Elm inspired Model-View-Update (MVU) implementation for Kotlin multiplatform.
• MAUI - .NET Multi-platform App UI
• Elm Batteriesstars108 - A project template and generator for Elm, Parcel, Cypress and Netlify
• IHP + Elm - The IHP Haskell Framework provides a built-in Elm boilerplate, useful when working with elm in the frontend and haskell in the backend
• Elm patterns - A collection of coding patterns.
• Codings hints - A list of README files by Evan.
• Ellies catalog - A Collection of small example in Ellie.
• Elm Cookbook - A digital book about Elm.
• Bolsterstars3 - An end-to-end encrypted journal app.
• Elm patterns - A collection of common patterns in Elm.
• elm-gamesstars103 - An excellent list of games made in Elm
• Elm Catalog - A catalog of Elm tools.
• Elm Catalog - Find packages in a catalog organized into categories.
• Dependabot - Automatic update PRs for your elm.json.
• Builtwithelm - Web site built with elm with list of projects and apps built with Elm.
• Elm SPA Example - Full stack Elm app w/ CRUD operations, Auth, routing, pagination and more. Codestars3.1k / Article
• Elm Example Appstars445 - A small SPA example in Elm to learn the basics
• TodoMVCstars1.2k - Proper implementation of the TodoMVC app.
• TodoMVC with JSON APIstars105 - Bare-bones, modular, heavily-documented todo app with JSON API persistence.
• TodoMVC/Firebasestars61 - Fork of TodoMVC demonstrating start-app, The Elm Architecturestars4.1k and Firebase as backend.
• TodoMVC in Electronstars86 - Documented and tested implementation of the Elm TodoMVC app in Electron.
• Gipherstars229 - A Tinder-like application for gifs built with elm and firebase!
• Collection of examplesstars209 - A collection of examples with advanced techniques for real-world Elm apps.
• <elm-ement>stars52 – Minimal example of a custom element.
• Elm Playground - Tiny Elm projects implemented for the sake of learning by example.
• Elm Architecture in Androidstars58 - An example Android application implemented with the Elm Architecture using the Kotlin programming language and Anko library.
• Elm + Phoenix + Webpackstars55 - A minimal Elm + Phoenix setup, using webpack instead of Brunch.
• Spotify Mapperstars56 - Elm app integrated with Spotify Api to search and explore new artists.
• Pokelmonstars14 - Elm project consuming PokéAPI.
• JWT auth with Django + Elmstars19 - JSON Web Token (JWT) authentication using Django (backend) and Elm (frontend).
• Bitcoin BR Chrome Extensionstars3 - Chrome extension built in Elm that shows the bitcoin value in all Brazilian exchanges.
• Elmstagramstars18 - Basic UI Clone of Instagram / Articles - Part 1 Part 2 Part 3
• Kanban Board in Elmstars294 - A kanban board (trello-alike) built with Elm and HTML5 Drag & Drop API
• Elm Playground - Pure SPA (with routing) exploring various aspects of Elm.
• Elm Hacker News PWAstars1 - A progressive web app built with Elm version 0.18, using the official Hacker-News API

• Elm Narrative Enginestars117 - A framework for building interactive fiction style stories in Elm. Detailed example elmnarrativeengine.com shows how to build a "chose your own adventure" game; perfect for beginners. Elm v.0.19
• Ari's Gardenstars41 - A recipe site built as an SPA that also makes use of the Elm parser.
• LSP-elmstars4 - Elm Language Server for Sublime (Recommended).
• Elm Syntax Highlighting - Syntax Highlighting for Elm in Sublime Text.
• Elm Format on Savestars13 - Sublime Text plugin to run elm-format on save.
• Glitch - Build fast, full-stack web apps in your browser.
• Elm Bits - A free weekly newsletter about Elm featuring hand-picked news, articles, books, events, tools, and libraries.
• Elm Radio - Tune in to the tools and techniques in the Elm ecosystem.
• The Elmish Book Building web applications in F# following The Elm Architecture from first principles.
• Elm Europe 2018 - A playlist of all talks from Elm Europe 2018
• Elm Conf 2016 - All talks from elm-conf 2016
• Elm Conf 2018 - All talks from elm-conf 2018
• Elm Europe 2017 - A playlist of all talks from Elm Europe 2017
• Implementing Elm - A deep dive into specific problems to help the Elm community.
• Elm Analysestars416 - Linter for the Elm programming language.
• Elm Formatstars1.2k - Automatic Elm code formatter adhering to Elm Style Guide.
• Elm JSONstars137 - Install, upgrade and uninstall Elm dependencies
• Elm Live - A flexible dev server for Elm. Live reload included!
• Elm Oraclestars153 - Query for information about values in elm source files. Used by most editor plugins.
• Elm Pages - Static site generator that prerenders HTML and hydrates into an Elm client-side app (here is a brief comparison with elmstatic).
• Elm Reviewstars133 - Code reviewer for the Elm programming language.
• type-o-ramastars221 - JS type systems interportability.
• PostCSS Elm Tailwindstars82 - Put some Tailwind in your Elm
• Learn Elmstars435 - Discover the beautiful programming language that makes front-end web apps a joy to build and maintain!
• Companies using Elmstars370 - A list of companies using Elm in production.
• elm-boilstars17 - Command Line Utility for creating an Elm boilerplate project easy to run, build and get deployed
• Spadesstars276 - Start an Elm SPA ready to the real world
• Elm packages - The official registry
• Elm Search - Search Elm documentation for operators, function signatures, etc.
• elm-spa - single page apps made easy
• haskell-to-elmstars45 - Generate Elm types, encoders, and decoders from Haskell types
• Elmerstars41 - Describe the behavior of Elm HTML applications
• Bolero - F# in WebAssembly using Elmish
• Icedstars9.4k - A cross-platform GUI library for Rust, inspired by Elm
• SwiftUI
• Elm Europe 2019 - Jun 2019
• Elm Japan
• Oslo Elm Day 2017 - A playlist of all talks from Oslo Elm Day 2017
• Elm Conf 2019 - Sep 2019
• A nice app on Elm street - An introduction to Elm
• Elm teststars195 - Unit and fuzz tests
• Elm Program test - Test complete Elm programs
• Elm Language Serverstars305 - Language server implementation for Elm
• Elm Doc Previewstars114 - Elm offline documentation previewer.
• Elmstatic - Elm-based static site generator.
• theJian/elm.vimstars0 - Elm syntax highlighting. Use with ale or Neoformat for Neovim since ElmCast/elm-vim does not support Elm 0.19.
• ElmCast/elm-vimstars571 - Elm 0.18 mode for Vim/Neovim.
• Elm Bridgestars95 - Generate Elm types from Haskell
• HTML to Elm - Convert HTML to Elm Html. Useful when porting an app to Elm.
• OpenApi Generatorstars8.5k - Generate OpenApi types for Elm.
• JSON Schema to Elmstars64 - Generates Elm types, JSON decoders, JSON encoders and fuzz tests from JSON schema specifications
• Quicktypestars6.4k - Generate JSON decoders and encoders from JSON
• Official Elm News - Official Elm blog
• Elm Weekly - A weekly newsletter about Elm
• Elm News - All Elm news in one place
• Elm Greenwood - Elm packages releases
• Elm Reddit - Elm news in Reddit
• elm-pluginstars309 - Elm plugin for IntelliJ IDEA.
• Elchemystars1.1k - Write Elixir code using statically-typed Elm-like syntax
• Fabulousstars823 - F# Functional App Development, using declarative dynamic UI
• Haskell to Elmstars66 - Collection of examples on places where Elm is different to Haskell, targeted at Elm beginners coming from Haskell backgrounds.
• Online REPL - The ELM Online REPL
• Elmishstars581 - Elm-like abstractions for F# apps
• Redux - A predictable state container for JavaScript apps.
• iOSstars155 A POC for using Elm 0.18 for native iOS Applications
• elmish-wasmstars16 A POC for compiling elm to Web Assembly
• elm-serverlessstars168 Run Elm 0.18 on Cloud Functions using the Serverless Frameworks
• Ellie - The Elm Live Editor
• run-elmstars42 — Run Elm code from the command line
• elm-instant - atom package to try your elm code from the editor. Provides a visual REPL and a preview pane.
• elm-compilerstars6.4k - Compiler for the Elm programming language.
• elm-webpack-loaderstars530 - Webpack loader for the Elm programming language.
• Parcel - Bundle Elm using Parcel
• grunt-elmstars19 - Grunt plugin that compiles Elm files to JavaScript.
• ElmLS - Elm Language Server integration
• elm-light-tablestars134 - Syntax highlighting, REPL, autocompletion, package management and much more for Light Table.
• elm-livestars978 - A flexible dev server for Elm. Live reload included.
• example-elm-hot-webpackstars9 - Example showing hot module reloading for Elm 0.19 and Webpack
• create-elm-appstars1.6k - Create Elm apps with no build configuration.
• elm-webpack-4-starterstars105 - Elm webpack 4 starter template.
• Elm Town - A podcast about the people in the Elm community.
• Elm in the Spring 2019 - Jun 2019
• Oslo Elm Day 2019 - Feb 2019
• Elm Conf 2017 - All talks from elm-conf 2017
• Dillon Kearns: Types Without Borders | 2018 - elm-conf 2018 talk about end-to-end type-safety using external schemas like GraphQL.

• Jamison Dance: Rethinking All Practices - Building Applications in Elm | 2016 - A talk given at React.js Conf 2016 about what Elm has to teach the JavaScript world and why JS devs should consider trying it.
• Richard Feldman: Introduction to Elm | 2016 - A talk that gives a broad, high-level introduction to Elm.
• Amitai Burstein: Frontend with Guarantees | 2016 - A talk from You Gotta Love Frontend 2016
• Jessica Kerr: Adventures in Elm | 2016 - A talk about the combination of functional programming with Elm at GOTO Chicago 2016.
• Aaron VonderHaar: Codevember | 2016 + ElmLive - elm live video examples.
• Richard Feldman: Making impossible states impossible | 2016 - A talk about modelling data structures in Elm in a way that makes invalid states unrepresentable
• Richard Feldman: Effects as Data | 2015 - A talk about how Elm manages side effects.
• Richard Feldman: Make the Back-End Team Jealous: Elm in Production | 2015 - A talk about Elm and initial steps to use it in production.
• Evan Czaplicki: Let's be mainstream! User focused design in Elm | 2015 - A talk from the father of Elm about the philosophy behind the language.
• Elm Conf
• Elm Europe
• Elm in the spring
• Oslo Elm day
• Side-effects of Elm in production - An experience report from Bellroy
• How Elm Made Our Work Better - How a team built a business-critical web app for a customer using Elm.
• Blazing Fast HTML - Virtual DOM in Elm.
• Elm from a Business Perspective - This article discusses topics about Elm from a business perspective
• Move fast and don’t break things. Running a startup on Elm - Some thoughts on Elm development by a Swedish startup.
• Blog of Brian Hicks - A blog with various topics about Elm.
• Introduction to The Elm Architecture and How to Build our First Application - An article describing the Elm architecture and how to build a simple application
• Functional Programming for Web Frontend by Jan Luxemburk - A Bachelor’s thesis about functional programming for frontend development with the focus on Elm.

nodes.categoryHTML:
Articles

Outdated articles (Not relevant for current Elm architecture)
nodes.itemHTML: • Composing Features and Behaviours in the Elm Architecture - An article describing how to organize code that follows the Elm architecture into independent features, how to communicate between features, and how to group some of these features together to assemble larger features.
• Exercism Elm Track - Collection of Elm exercises.
• Beginning Elm - A gentle introduction to the Elm programming language.
• Elm Koansstars232 - Practice exercises for learning Elm.
• Learn Elm in Y Minutes - Syntax and features overview. The Elm page on learnxinyminutes.com
• Elm Maybe - Dealing with null/Nothing - Working with the Maybe type, with nicely commented code examples.
• Programming Elm - Thorough book from The Pragmatic Programmers that covers basics and advanced concepts.
• Elm cheat sheetstars934 - Syntax and features overview.
• Ninety-nine Problems, Solved in Elm - Adaptations for Elm from Ninety-Nine Haskell Problems.
• Elm Tutorials on Codementor - Two tutorials on building web apps with Elm.
• Elm programming language - a brief overview of Elm as a programming language.
• Elm: A Beginners' Guide to Elm and Data - Beginners' course to Elm and Data
• Practical Elm for a Busy Developer - A non-beginner book about the practical aspects of developing Elm applications.
• Elm: Building Reactive Web Apps - Learn how to build reactive web apps using Elm.
• Elm Tutorial - A tutorial on developing single page web applications with Elm.
• elm-webpack-starter-kidstars5 - A very very basic elm + webpack 4 template.
• elm-boilerplatestars3 - A simple Makefile able to create Elm app.
• elm-initstars11 - Interactive setup for new Elm projects.
• elm-newstars81 - Generate initial project scaffolding based on a template.
• Elmmet: Emmet for Elm (Visual Studio Code) - Emmetio abbreviation expander into composition of Elm function with elm-format'er inside.
• Elm Tutorial by Auth0 - A tutorial on building an app in Elm from authentication to calling an API.
• InfoQ Podcast 2017-04-27 - Richard Feldman discusses how Elm compares to React.js
• Elm FAQ - Elm FAQ from Elm Community.
• atom-elm-navigator - A side panel that helps to navigate to any function, type definition or port in your project.
• HTML to Elm for Visual Studio Code - VSCode plugin to convert HTML to Elm
• vim-elm-helpstars8 - Offline Elm documentation access in your editor.
• emmet-vimstars5.5k - Markup expansion with elm support.
• Greg Ziegan: Elm live coding videos - Live coding videos on youtube.
• Elm For Beginners - Video Course - Build your first Elm Web App.
• Full Stack Radio 44 - What the heck is Elm? In this episode, Joel Clermont talks about Elm and functional programming.
• The Web Platform Podcast 108 - Elm Revisited.
• elmkitstars51 - A lightweight Brunch based setup for web app. Includes Brunch, Hot Module Replacement, Elm, Scss, Elm tests.
• Single-Page Web Apps in Elm - Five parts tutorial on Elm.
• elmjutsu - Autocompletion, go to definition, find usages, rename symbol, etc. for the Atom editor.
• Elm Basics - Walk through all the syntax and basic ideas in Elm as a general programming language.
• Elm Seeds - Short screencasts to teach you the Elm programming language from Erik Person.

nodes.categoryHTML:
Articles

Outdated articles (Not relevant for current Elm architecture)
nodes.itemHTML: • Elm & Guarantees - a realistic look at where Elm is and isn’t superior to other options.
• elm-app-boilerplatestars121 - A fully-featured base project for Elm apps: Webpack, HMR, ES6, JS and Elm tests, Semantic UI, sample code and more.

nodes.categoryHTML:
Articles

Outdated articles (Not relevant for current Elm architecture)
nodes.itemHTML: • Elm & Components - A blog post describing a possible approach to reducing TEA boilerplate. Useful for component libraries and anyone interested in seeing the amazing things you can do with function types.

nodes.categoryHTML:
Articles

Outdated articles (Not relevant for current Elm architecture)
nodes.itemHTML: • Getting Started with Elm - Series of Elm education tutorials.
• atom-elm-snippetsstars6 - Elm snippets for Atom.
• A Concise Introduction to Elm - High overview of language features.
• Functional Geekery 33 - Richard Feldman and Tessa Kelly.
• Software Engineering Daily - Elm with Richard Feldman and Srinivas Rao.
• JavaScript Jabber 175 - Elm with Evan Czaplicki and Richard Feldman.
• Ruby Rogues 212 - Elm with Richard Feldman and Evan Czaplicki.
• The Web Platform Podcast 15 - Functional Programming with Elm, ClojureScript, Om, and React.
• The Web Platform Podcast 76 - The Elm Programming Language.
• atom-linter-elm-make - Elm code linter for the Atom editor.
• atom-language-elm - Syntax highlighting and autocompletion for the Atom editor.
• emacs-elm-modestars361 - Syntax highlighting, Elm REPL, Elm make and Elm format integration for the Emacs editor.
• elm-webpack-starterstars883 - A simple Webpack setup for writing Elm apps.
• Elm: Functional frontend development - Series of articles about fundamentals and advanced topics.
• Writing native - Learn how to create native JavaScript modules for Elm.
• Official tutorial — General information and in-depth guide with examples.
• Learn you an Elm - Elm tutorial with exhaustive examples and descriptions.

Articles

Outdated articles (Not relevant for current Elm architecture)
nodes.itemHTML: • Elm for Web Developersstars59 - A collection of notes for web developers looking into moving to Elm.
• Learning FP the hard way - Experiences on the Elm language.
• FP with games in Elm - Switching from imperative to functional programming with games in Elm.
• elm-packagestars214 - Command line tool to share Elm libraries.
• awesomestars164.9k by @sindresorhus
• awesome-awesomenessstars27.6k by @bayandin
• Architecture Tutorialstars4.1k - How to create modular Elm code that scales nicely with your app.
